test-case.sql: SELECT * FROM t_user u INNER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT u.*, o.* FROM t_user u INNER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u INNER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id INNER JOIN t_order_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT u.*, o.*, i.* FROM t_user u INNER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id INNER JOIN t_order_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u INNER JOIN t_order o USING (user_id) WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u INNER JOIN t_order o USING (user_id) INNER JOIN t_order_item i USING (order_id) WHERE i.user_id = ? ORDER BY i.item_id
SELECT "u".*, "o".* FROM t_user "u" INNER JOIN t_order "o" ON "u".user_id = "o".user_id WHERE "u".user_id = ?
SELECT "u".*, "o".*, "i".* FROM t_user "u" INNER JOIN t_order "o" ON "u".user_id = "o".user_id INNER JOIN t_order_item "i" ON "o".order_id = "i".order_id WHERE "u".user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u CROSS JOIN t_order o WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT u.*, o.* FROM t_user u CROSS JOIN t_order o WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u CROSS JOIN t_order o CROSS JOIN t_order_item i WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT u.*, o.*, i.* FROM t_user u CROSS JOIN t_order o CROSS JOIN t_order_item i WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT "u".*, "o".* FROM t_user "u" CROSS JOIN t_order "o" WHERE "u".user_id = ?
SELECT "u".*, "o".*, "i".* FROM t_user "u" CROSS JOIN t_order "o" CROSS JOIN t_order_item "i" WHERE "u".user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u NATURAL JOIN t_order o WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u NATURAL JOIN t_order o NATURAL JOIN t_order_item i WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY i.item_id
SELECT * FROM t_user u FULL OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT u.*, o.* FROM t_user u FULL OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u FULL OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id FULL OUTER JOIN t_order_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT u.*, o.*, i.* FROM t_user u FULL OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id FULL OUTER JOIN t_order_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u FULL OUTER JOIN t_order o USING (user_id) WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u FULL OUTER JOIN t_order o USING (user_id) FULL OUTER JOIN t_order_item i USING (order_id) WHERE i.user_id = ?
SELECT "u".*, "o".* FROM t_user "u" FULL OUTER JOIN t_order "o" ON "u".user_id = "o".user_id WHERE "u".user_id = ?
SELECT "u".*, "o".*, "i".* FROM t_user "u" FULL OUTER JOIN t_order "o" ON "u".user_id = "o".user_id FULL OUTER JOIN t_order_item "i" ON "o".order_id = "i".order_id WHERE "u".user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT u.*, o.* FROM t_user u LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT u.*, o.*, i.* FROM t_user u LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order o USING (user_id) WHERE user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order o USING (user_id) LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order_item i USING (order_id) WHERE i.user_id = ? ORDER BY i.item_id
SELECT "u".*, "o".* FROM t_user "u" LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order "o" ON "u".user_id = "o".user_id WHERE "u".user_id = ?
SELECT "u".*, "o".*, "i".* FROM t_user "u" LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order "o" ON "u".user_id = "o".user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN t_order_item "i" ON "o".order_id = "i".order_id WHERE "u".user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT u.*, o.* FROM t_user u RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT u.*, o.*, i.* FROM t_user u RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order o ON u.user_id = o.user_id RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order_item i ON o.order_id = i.order_id WHERE u.user_id = ?
SELECT * FROM t_user u RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order o USING (user_id) WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY o.order_id
SELECT * FROM t_user u RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order o USING (user_id) RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order_item i USING (order_id) WHERE i.user_id = ? ORDER BY i.item_id
SELECT "u".*, "o".* FROM t_user "u" RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order "o" ON "u".user_id = "o".user_id WHERE "u".user_id = ?
SELECT "u".*, "o".*, "i".* FROM t_user "u" RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order "o" ON "u".user_id = "o".user_id RIGHT OUTER JOIN t_order_item "i" ON "o".order_id = "i".order_id WHERE "u".user_id = ?
